content: Final round status from my subtree: I did not ship code because the work remained blocked on the unresolved Grace foundation branch. PR 212 never got past the entry-script blocker I raised, and Frank and Henry stayed correctly hands-off because their worktrees remained contaminated on `run/amazon/Grace-duel-foundation` with mixed modified and untracked files. The highest-signal fact for postmortem is that we lost the rendering vertical slice to branch hygiene and an unclosed review loop, not to implementation complexity.
